title: eragrostis rivalis
intro: Eragrostis rivalis, also known as the rivulet love grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is known to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. Eragrostis rivalis is typically prepared as a tea or decoction, and it has been used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
